name: Binolt
description: A skilled Blacklist Hunter who's also on the wanted list himself, he has the ability to learn every bit of information from someone after chewing on someones hair that's been cut using his favorite scissors.  He preys on Bisuke but does not back down after learning about her true form, requesting a match without Nen.   Being beaten by Bisuke, he's being forced to practice with Gon and Killua.
